title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with GPU/CPU acceleration and a built-in model registry.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API—use it in Node, browsers, or edge runtimes to chat, stream, pull, and manage local models.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and asyncio bindings for Ollama; install from PyPI and integrate local LLMs into notebooks, scripts, or FastAPI services.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that exposes Ollama models as LangChain LLMs and chat models with tool-calling, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (now renamed Open WebUI) that adds chat history, multi-user support, RAG, and plugin system atop the local server.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama offering synchronous and asynchronous APIs, Maven Central distribution, and Android compatibility.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem that wraps the Ollama REST API with idiomatic Ruby objects and Fibers for streaming.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built Go CLI that adds extra commands (bulk pull, model diff, config sync) and shell completions on top of the official binary.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot proxy that routes completion requests to a local Ollama model instead of OpenAI.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for building local RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community-curated recipes showing how to combine Ollama with LangChain, LlamaIndex, FastAPI, Next.js, and edge deployments.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU node-affinity and horizontal pod autoscaler.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & CUDA) published to Docker Hub with multi-arch support and rootless mode.

title: ollama-express
summary: Lightweight Express.js starter that exposes an OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint backed by Ollama for rapid prototyping.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate with async/tokio support and strongly-typed request/response models for Ollama’s REST API.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a “Chat with notes” command using a local Ollama model for private knowledge-base Q&A.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that streams Ollama responses in threads and supports slash commands, system prompts, and per-user rate limits.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Python Slack Bolt app that brings local LLM power into Slack channels with ephemeral messages and optional app mention triggers.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package and NixOS module for Ollama with automatic GPU driver detection and systemd service hardening.

title: ollama-reddit
summary: Active subreddit for sharing models, troubleshooting, benchmarks, and ecosystem announcements around Ollama.
